component.name: Safe Discover
component.summary: Browse, install, and update packages safely

description.p: Safe Discover is a Kirigami-based package management GUI for CachyOS and Arch Linux. It supports pacman, paru (AUR), Flatpak, and fwupd firmware updates with safe, explicit update actions and no PackageKit dependency.
Fix Safe Update: async execution with real-time progress, fix navigation toolbar warnings, fix completion notification.
UX improvements: inline install/remove buttons, close button on details pane, operation progress feedback, KDE Add-ons dialog, CI packaging fixes.
